asi.notes: Baseline run to establish starting point before optimizations

description: Derived Serialize for enums (removed manual impl) - slight regression (202.51 → 204.91 ns)

asi.change: Replace manual Serialize for MessageKind/OperationType with derive(Serialize)
asi.hypothesis: Derived impl might be as fast or faster due to better inlining
asi.result: Slight regression likely within noise (2.4 ns)
asi.decision: Discard due to worse metric, though code simpler

name: Optimize full message processing pipeline throughput

asi.reason: simd-json may be optimized for deserialization only
